entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems used for agricultural production whose sustainability is linked to resource management and food security goals

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: Environmental assets that, when managed carefully, increase productivity per unit input

entities.name: NO POVERTY
entities.description: A socio-economic goal aimed at the eradication of poverty

entities.name: ZERO HUNGER
entities.description: A socio-economic goal aimed at the eradication of hunger

entities.name: SOILS
entities.description: The land surface of croplands and wastelands subject to degradation and security measures

entities.name: EROSION
entities.description: A process of soil degradation involving the wearing away of the topsoil

entities.name: NUTRIENT DEPLETION
entities.description: A process of soil degradation involving the loss of essential nutrients

entities.name: INTEGRATED WATERSHED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A holistic approach to managing water and land resources to improve sustainability

entities.name: SOIL SECURITY MEASURES
entities.description: Scientific knowledge-based interventions designed to protect soil and improve productivity

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The efficiency of agricultural production in terms of output per unit of input

entities.name: PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The economic gain derived from agricultural production

entities.name: SOIL LOSS
entities.description: The reduction of soil quantity, often caused by erosion

entities.name: WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The presence and accessibility of water for agricultural purposes

relationships.description: Careful management of natural resources leads to the sustainability of agricultural production systems
Sustainable production systems help achieve the goal of no poverty
Sustainable production systems help achieve the goal of zero hunger
Erosion causes degradation of soils in croplands and wastelands
Nutrient depletion causes degradation of soils in croplands and wastelands
Integrated watershed management incorporates soil security measures
Soil security measures have a positive impact on agricultural productivity
Soil security measures have a positive impact on profitability
Soil security measures result in reduced soil loss
Soil security measures result in increased water availability
